dialog.grantDescription: This user will gain access to the platform admin console and cross-clinic administration.
dialog.removeDescription: This user will lose platform admin access. Existing non-admin roles will remain assigned.
dialog.grantImpact: Granting admin access gives this account platform-wide administrative reach.
dialog.removeImpact: Removing admin access takes this account out of platform administration.

adminCustody.title: Admin role custody
adminCustody.missingRole: The admin role was not found in role metadata.

grant.title: Grant admin role

grant.empty: No non-admin users match this filter.

detail.selectRole: Select a role to inspect permissions.

branchSubscriptions.title: Branch subscriptions
branchSubscriptions.description: Platform workbench for branch access, profile availability, and commercial terms.
branchSubscriptions.changeReasonPlaceholder: Describe why this change is being made.
branchSubscriptions.changeReasonHint: This reason is saved with the admin action payload for audit review.

review.accessDescription: Access changes affect whether branch users can make mutating clinic updates.
review.suspendWarning: Read-only access blocks mutating clinic actions while preserving login and viewing access.
review.accessRestrictionHelper: Mutating branch actions will be blocked.
review.accessNotesRequiredHelper: The review keeps the access rationale with the audit payload.
review.profilesDescription: Profile changes affect available branch workflows and the fixed fee multiplier.
review.profilesWarning: Profile availability changes apply to this branch after saving. Review operational impact before confirming.
review.profileDisableWarning: Disabling enabled profiles removes branch workflows after saving.
review.profileDisableHelper: These branch workflows will no longer be available after confirmation.
review.pricingDescription: Pricing changes are scheduled for the next billing month and affect future invoice calculations.
review.pricingWarning: Invoice generation will use these terms when the effective month is reached.
review.pricingImpactDescription: These terms assign branch operating capacity for the next billing month.
review.pricingOverageHelper: Applied only after included capacity is used.

branchSubscriptions.selectClinicNotice: Select a clinic in the platform admin top bar to manage its branch subscriptions.
branchSubscriptions.selectBranchReviewPricing: Select a branch to review pricing terms.
branchSubscriptions.noManagePermission: You can view branch subscriptions, but you do not have permission to change them.
branchSubscriptions.flexiblePlanDescription: Set the base branch fee, monthly visit allowance, and required overage blocks.
branchSubscriptions.flexibleUsageSummaryDescription: The branch keeps a flexible base, visit allowance, and billable overage blocks for the next billing month.
branchSubscriptions.capacityPackageDescription: Name the package, set its package fee and included visit capacity, then optionally define overage blocks.
branchSubscriptions.capacityDecisionDescription: This assigns the branch package, included visit capacity, and overage policy for the next billing month.
branchSubscriptions.capacityOverageOptionalNotice: Leave both overage fields empty if this package has no overage billing. If one is entered, both are required.
branchSubscriptions.capacityOverageIncompleteNotice: Complete both overage block size and fee, or leave both empty for no overage billing.
branchSubscriptions.pricingRequiredNotice: Complete the required fields for the selected pricing model before saving.
branchSubscriptions.noPricingChangesNotice: Change at least one pricing value before review.
branchSubscriptions.pricingImpactDescription: These values are prepared now and used when invoices are generated for the next billing month.
branchSubscriptions.readOnlyNotice: Read-only blocks mutating clinic actions while preserving login and viewing access.
branchSubscriptions.activeAccessNotice: Active access allows permitted branch users to continue normal clinic operations.
branchSubscriptions.accessNotesRequiredNotice: Add access notes before reviewing a move into read-only access.
branchSubscriptions.profileImpactDescription: Profile availability changes which workflows the branch can use and updates the fixed monthly fee multiplier.
branchSubscriptions.profileDisableHighImpactNotice: Disabling {{profiles}} removes those workflows from this branch after saving.
branchSubscriptions.fixedFeeRule: First profile is 1.0x fixed fee; each extra enabled profile adds 0.5x.
branchSubscriptions.selectProfileBeforeSaving: Select at least one enabled profile before saving.

platformBilling.title: Platform billing
platformBilling.description: Generate branch invoice packages, review usage, and record offline collections.
platformBilling.selectClinicNotice: Select a clinic in the top bar to manage platform billing.
platformBilling.selectBranchMonthPreview: Select a branch and month to preview billing.
platformBilling.activeInvoiceNotice: This branch-month already has an active invoice package. Use invoice detail to download artifacts or record collections.
platformBilling.generationNotice: Generation locks this branch-month and creates the invoice PDF plus the Excel data sheet.
platformBilling.noInvoices: No platform invoices for this branch-month.
platformBilling.selectInvoice: Select an invoice to view details.
platformBilling.noUsageLines: No usage lines were captured on this invoice.
platformBilling.previewFailed: Billing preview could not be generated for this branch-month.
platformBilling.voidLockedNotice: Void is locked after collection records exist.
platformBilling.noBillableVisits: No billable visits are logged for this branch-month.
platformBilling.collectionPaidDescription: This invoice is fully collected and no further collection action is needed.
platformBilling.collectionImpactDescription: Record offline collections after money is received to keep the invoice balance accurate.
platformBilling.voidedImpactDescription: This invoice has been cancelled and remains visible for billing history.

not_ready.label: Not ready
not_ready.description: Select the clinic, branch, and billing month before generating a preview.

ready_to_preview.label: Ready to preview
ready_to_preview.description: The branch-month is selected. Generate or refresh the preview before issuing artifacts.

preview_generated.label: Preview generated
preview_generated.description: Usage and pricing are visible for review. Adjustments can still be added before issuing.

invoice_generated.label: Invoice generated
invoice_generated.description: The PDF and data workbook exist, and the branch-month is locked.

partially_collected.label: Partially collected
partially_collected.description: At least one offline collection has been recorded and a balance remains.

paid.label: Paid
paid.description: The invoice balance is fully collected.

voided.label: Voided
voided.description: This invoice is cancelled and kept only as billing history.

artifacts.title: Current artifacts
artifacts.reviewDescription: Review generated artifacts and billing totals for the selected invoice package.
artifacts.downloadDescription: Download the generated PDF invoice and Excel data sheet for this branch-month.

adjustmentDialog.title: Record adjustment
adjustmentDialog.description: Use positive amounts for extra charges and negative amounts for credits.
adjustmentDialog.impactDescription: Saved adjustments change the invoice total and balance. Generated artifacts may need regeneration before sharing.
adjustmentDialog.amountHelper: Positive amounts add charges; negative amounts add credits.
adjustmentDialog.auditHelper: Add at least 10 characters so the billing audit trail explains the change.

collectionDialog.title: Record collection
collectionDialog.description: Track the offline payment after the money is collected.
collectionDialog.exceedsBalance: Collection amount cannot exceed the remaining balance.
collectionDialog.impactDescription: This records an offline collection in the platform ledger and reduces the invoice balance.
collectionDialog.projectedBalanceHelper: Balance after this collection is recorded.
collectionDialog.projectedBalanceBlocked: Amount must stay within the open balance.

voidDialog.title: Void invoice
voidDialog.description: Voiding releases the branch-month lock only when no collections exist.
voidDialog.impactDescription: Voiding cancels this invoice package and keeps the action in the audit trail.
voidDialog.packageHelper: The PDF and workbook should no longer be treated as active billing artifacts.
voidDialog.lockHelper: The lock is released only when no collection records exist.
voidDialog.auditHelper: Add at least 10 characters so the cancellation is explainable later.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.utilizationFootnote: Updates in real-time based on in-progress visits.

sessions.reassessmentDescription: How many sessions until this patient is due for their next reassessment? Leave empty or set to 0 if no future reassessment is needed.
sessions.reassessmentDueDescription: This patient is due for a reassessment. Are you sure you want to create a regular session instead of an assessment session?
sessions.initReassessmentDescription: This is an assessment session. How many sessions until this patient is due for their next reassessment? Leave empty to skip tracking.

marketing.metaTitle: Recovera | Clinic management built around your specialty

hero.eyebrow: Made for the way clinics really work
hero.title: Recovera clinic management, built around your specialty.
hero.description: Bring appointments, patient records, visits, team coordination, and branch activity into one clear workspace that feels natural from the first day.
proofs: Four clinic specialties from day one
A clear view across every branch
Arabic and English for the whole team

about.title: A clinic software company focused on real operating pressure.
about.description: Recovera is built for clinics that need their day to feel less scattered: fewer duplicated records, fewer disconnected follow-ups, and a clearer view of what every branch is doing.
about.promise: Start with a ready platform, then adapt the workflows, language, and commercial model around the branch and specialty instead of forcing every clinic into one generic template.

principles.title: Built around the clinic day
principles.description: Appointments, patients, visits, teams, and branch activity are treated as one operating rhythm, not separate tools.

principles.title: Specialty-aware from the start
principles.description: Physiotherapy, medical, dental, laser, and dermatology teams can keep their own language and care details.

principles.title: Clear enough for owners
principles.description: Managers and owners get practical visibility into activity, subscriptions, and branch performance without drowning the team in admin.

profiles.eyebrow: One platform, four ways of working
profiles.title: Your specialty should shape the system, not fight it.
profiles.description: Choose the kind of care your branch provides. Recovera adapts the language, clinical details, and daily flow so every team sees what belongs to its work.

items.title: Physiotherapy
items.kicker: From first assessment to the final session
items.description: Keep appointments, treatment sessions, clinical progress, and follow-ups connected around one patient journey.
points: See the full treatment timeline without searching across screens
Keep assessments and follow-ups easy for the care team to find
Give reception and therapists the same up-to-date patient picture
Follow activity across one branch or a growing clinic group

items.title: Medical clinics
items.kicker: The right context before every consultation
items.description: Organize appointments, complaints, diagnoses, prescriptions, and follow-up plans in a workflow that stays focused on the consultation.
points: Prepare the doctor with the patient history that matters
Keep consultation notes and next steps together
Make follow-up appointments easier for reception to coordinate
Give owners a clearer picture of branch activity

items.title: Dentist clinics
items.kicker: Every procedure in the right patient story
items.description: Bring appointments, tooth and area notes, procedures, treatment plans, and return visits into one practical dental workflow.
points: Keep procedure details easy to review at the chair
Connect treatment plans with the visits that move them forward
Help reception coordinate return visits without guesswork
Track activity while each branch keeps its own daily rhythm

items.title: Laser and dermatology centers
items.short: Courses of care that are easy to follow
items.kicker: A clear record across every treatment session
items.description: Coordinate consultations, treatment areas, device details, session progress, and aftercare in one consistent client journey.
points: Keep treatment details available before the next session
Follow multi-session courses without losing the bigger picture
Give the front desk a clear view of upcoming care
Keep every branch aligned without flattening how it works

experience.title: Less chasing. More clarity, from reception to follow-up.
experience.description: Recovera connects the handoffs that shape a good clinic day, so information reaches the right person and every team member knows what comes next.

steps.title: Welcome patients without starting from zero
steps.description: Reception can find the right patient, arrange the visit, and keep branch activity moving without repeating the same work.
steps.result: Faster intake and fewer disconnected records.

steps.title: Give every doctor the right context
steps.description: Each specialty sees the details, language, and follow-up flow that belongs to its own kind of care.
steps.result: A clearer visit for the doctor and the patient.

steps.title: See the whole clinic without losing the details
steps.description: Managers can understand patients, teams, visits, and branches from one place while each branch keeps its day-to-day focus.
steps.result: Better decisions with less manual reporting.

spotlight.label: One connected patient story
spotlight.title: Care can continue smoothly across your branches.
spotlight.description: When a patient already belongs to your clinic group, the next branch can build on that relationship instead of creating a disconnected record.

works.title: Two product paths, one goal: cleaner clinic operations.
works.description: Some clinics need a ready subscription platform. Others need a dedicated custom build outside Recovera. The work starts by understanding the operating model, then choosing the right path.
works.note: The point is not to sell the same system to every clinic. The point is to match the technology to how the clinic actually works and grows.

items.title: Recovera for branches that want a ready clinic system
items.description: A multi-specialty management platform for appointments, patients, visits, teams, branch activity, and subscription-based access.
items.result: Best when the clinic wants to start quickly and grow within a structured platform.

items.title: Custom clinic systems for special requirements
items.description: A separate software project for organizations that need unusual workflows, private architecture, advanced integrations, or full ownership outside Recovera.
items.result: Best when the requirements are too specific for a shared subscription product.

items.title: Operational design before screens and forms
items.description: Before building, the work clarifies roles, patient journeys, branch rules, reporting needs, and the decisions each screen should support.
items.result: Best when the clinic needs software that matches real work, not just a prettier interface.

pricing.title: Two simple ways to match your subscription to your activity.
pricing.description: Choose the approach that makes the most sense for each branch, whether monthly activity changes often or usually falls within a familiar range.
pricing.note: Each branch can follow the pricing model that best reflects its size, specialties, and usual monthly activity.

models.label: Flexible monthly plan
models.title: A steady base with room for busier months
models.description: Your branch starts with a fixed monthly fee that includes an agreed number of completed visits. If activity goes beyond that allowance, additional usage is calculated in clear blocks.
models.bestForValue: Branches that want a predictable monthly base while patient volume changes from one month to another.
points: A monthly base that is easy to plan around
An included allowance matched to the branch
Clear overage blocks when activity grows
Terms that can reflect the branch's specialty mix

visual.title: How the plan flexes
visual.note: The base stays steady. Additional usage appears only after the agreed monthly allowance is reached.

models.label: Tiered branch packages
models.title: A package that fits your usual monthly volume
models.description: Your branch is matched to a clear monthly visit range and package price. More, closer ranges make it easier to move between packages as the clinic grows.
models.bestForValue: Branches with a fairly consistent monthly rhythm that prefer a clear capacity level and price.
points: A clear visit range for every package
Smaller steps between capacity levels
A straightforward monthly package price
Room for branch-specific terms when needed

visual.title: How capacity grows
visual.note: Closer capacity ranges keep the move from one package to the next smoother and easier to understand.

customSystem.title: A dedicated clinic system for special requirements and larger scale.
customSystem.description: Recovera is the subscription platform for clinics that want a ready operating system. If your organization needs unusual workflows, private architecture, deep integrations, or a system you fully own outside Recovera, that becomes a separate custom software build.
points: A discovery phase to map the workflows, roles, integrations, data, and reporting you actually need
Custom modules and patient journeys built around your operating model instead of Recovera's product limits
Separate architecture, delivery scope, and ownership model for organizations that need their own system
customSystem.hint: If the standard branch plans do not fit, the next conversation is a custom system scope, not a Recovera subscription.

visual.label: Custom software route
visual.title: Built from your requirements, not from a preset plan
visual.description: A custom engagement starts by defining the operating model, then turns that into a separate system with its own scope, infrastructure, and delivery plan.

items.label: Understand
items.description: Map complex workflows, teams, branches, and data needs

items.label: Architect
items.description: Define custom modules, integrations, permissions, and reports

items.label: Deliver
items.description: Create a dedicated system with its own rollout and support model

partners.title: Built with the people who carry the clinic day.
partners.description: Recovera is designed around the teams whose coordination makes the clinic feel professional to patients and manageable to owners.

items.title: Clinic owners
items.description: Need clear visibility into branch activity, growth, subscriptions, and where attention is needed.

items.title: Doctors and care teams
items.description: Need the right patient context before the visit and a workflow that respects the specialty.

items.title: Reception and secretaries
items.description: Need fast patient logistics, appointment handling, and fewer repeated admin steps.

items.title: Growing clinic groups
items.description: Need branch-level control while keeping patients, teams, and operations connected.

final.eyebrow: A better rhythm for every clinic day
final.title: One system that feels familiar to your team and clear to clinic owners.
final.description: Start with the specialties your branches need today, then let Recovera grow with the way your clinic works.

footer.tagline: Clinic management that adapts to your specialty.

sessions.assessmentDoctorRestricted: Selected doctor cannot be assigned to assessment or reassessment visits.
sessions.timeRange: Visit time must be a whole hour between 10:00 and 24:00
sessions.slotConflict: Cannot move this visit. The doctor already has two visits in this time slot.

visitDetails.title: Visit details

visitImages.title: Visit images
visitImages.uploadHint: Select up to {{count}} JPG, PNG, or WebP images. Each image may be up to 5 MB.
visitImages.uploadFailed: Upload stopped at {{file}}. Successful images were kept; retry the remaining selection.
visitImages.selectionLimit: Select no more than {{count}} images for the remaining visit capacity.
visitImages.invalidType: Choose a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.
visitImages.tooLarge: The image must be 5 MB or smaller.
visitImages.optimizationFailed: The image could not be prepared. Choose a smaller image.
visitImages.loadFailed: The protected image could not be loaded.
visitImages.emptySession: No images have been uploaded for this visit.
visitImages.emptyGallery: No visit images have been uploaded for this patient.
visitImages.deleteDescription: This removes this image from the visit.
visitImages.limitReached: This visit has reached the maximum of {{max}} images.
